exam_name: SAS Certified Professional: SAS Platform Administration

testing_centers.notes: Online proctoring or test center via PSI

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match exam registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No open-book, notes, or external resources permitted. Proctor monitors via webcam for online proctored sessions.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 3 years. Renewal requires 15 continuing education credits per 3-year cycle.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period after a failed attempt. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: SAS Training
official_study_resources.notes: Official instructor-led and e-learning courses aligned to certification exams

official_study_resources.title: SAS Certification Exam Content Guides
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam content guides listing all topic areas and sample questions

aliases: sas certified professional sas platform administration
